name: Workflow 2 — GitHub PR Sync
description: Polls GitHub every 15 minutes for PR metrics. Computes review lag, merge rate, and open PR age, then posts to /internal/sync/github. Notifies Slack on new PRs.

parameters.text:
={{ '🚨 *Workflow 2 — GitHub PR Sync FAILED*
Repo: ' + ($('Extract Workspaces').first().json.github_repos[0] ?? 'unknown') + '
Error: ' + ($json.message ?? JSON.stringify($json)) + '
Timestamp: ' + new Date().toISOString() }}
